name: Crazy Crust Apple Pie (Makes Its Own Crust)
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Apple Pie Filling - 1 lb 5 oz
1/2 Teaspoon Apple Pie Spice OR Cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, water, and shortening.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and blend well at the lowest speed.
3. Beat the mixture for 2 minutes at medium speed.
4. Spread the batter into a 9 or 10-inch deep dish pie pan.
5. Carefully spoon the filling into the center of the batter without stirring.
6. Bake at 425°F for 40-45 minutes, until the crust is golden brown.
